test_RoyaltyInfo().notice: 查询版税：royaltyInfo(tokenId, salePrice)         → (receiver, royaltyAmount)  默认 5%

test_SetTokenRoyalty().notice: 设置独立版税：setTokenRoyalty(tokenId, receiver, feeNumerator)         改后 royaltyInfo 返回新值，不再使用默认版税。
